versions.changes: Initial release. Covers 7 assessment sections (Accuracy & Performance, Fairness & Bias, Robustness & Drift, Explainability & Transparency, Human Oversight, GPAI Obligations, Governance). Includes 7 cross-metric validation rules, risk-level calculation, 8 use-case templates, CI/CD integration via GitHub Actions, and export to JSON, HTML, and PDF. GPAI systemic risk threshold set at 1e25 FLOPs per EU AI Act Article 51.

frameworks.eu_ai_act: Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, published OJ 12 Jul 2024. High-risk obligations apply from 2 Aug 2026. GPAI obligations from 2 Aug 2025.
frameworks.nist_ai_rmf: NIST AI 100-1 v1.0, January 2023. Mapped to GOVERN, MAP, MEASURE, MANAGE functions.
frameworks.iso_42001: ISO/IEC 42001:2023, published 18 Dec 2023. Mapped to clauses 4-10 and Annex A controls.
